metadata.source: Grade 3 English final writing and language batch

subject: English

lesson.story_mission: Join the Grade 3 Writing Studio team to practice opinion writing with reasons.
lesson.objective: I can use Grade 3 strategies for opinion writing with reasons.
lesson.concept_explanation: Strong Grade 3 writers plan the parts of opinion writing with reasons, choose words that fit, and reread so readers can understand the message.
lesson.common_misconception: A writer may give facts without clearly saying what they think.
lesson.real_world_connection: Clear writing helps classmates, families, and teachers understand your ideas in every subject.
lesson.lesson_summary: Plan the parts, write complete sentences, and reread with the checklist.
lesson.mini_lesson: Read the prompt, name the writing job, build the sentence or paragraph, then check your conventions.

worked_examples.text: Watch how a writer uses the model to complete opinion writing with reasons before answering.

question_audio.text: Watch how a writer uses the model to complete opinion writing with reasons before answering.
question_audio.label: Read Question

hint_ladder: Read the prompt and name the writing job.
Use the visual model to plan the missing part.
Reread for capitals, punctuation, and complete meaning.

guided_practice.prompt: Which sentence states an opinion about school gardens?
guided_practice.correct_answer: Our school should plant a garden.
hints: Read the prompt and identify the writing job.
Use the visual model to plan your answer.
Reread your answer before you finish.
guided_practice.explanation: This answer matches the Grade 3 writing target and gives the reader enough information.
guided_practice.feedback: Strong writing move — you used the checklist.

question_audio.text: Which sentence states an opinion about school gardens?
question_audio.label: Read Question

choices: Our school should plant a garden.

audio.text: Our school should plant a garden.
audio.label: Listen

guided_practice.opinion: Our school should plant a garden.
guided_practice.reason: because students can learn about plants.
guided_practice.closing: That is why it is a good idea.

checkpoint.prompt: Write an opinion paragraph about bike racks with an opinion, two reasons, linking words, and a conclusion.
checkpoint.correct_answer: I think bike racks is important because more students could ride safely. Also, it helps our class. That is why bike racks matters.
hints: Read the prompt and identify the writing job.
Use the visual model to plan your answer.
Reread your answer before you finish.
checkpoint.explanation: This answer matches the Grade 3 writing target and gives the reader enough information.
checkpoint.feedback: Strong writing move — you used the checklist.

question_audio.text: Write an opinion paragraph about bike racks with an opinion, two reasons, linking words, and a conclusion.
question_audio.label: Read Question

acceptable_answers: I think bike racks is important because more students could ride safely. Also, it helps our class. That is why bike racks matters.

audio.text: I think bike racks is important because more students could ride safely. Also, it helps our class. That is why bike racks matters.
audio.label: Listen

checkpoint.opinion: Our school needs more bike racks.

game_theme.title: Opinion Writing With Reasons Skill World
game_theme.mission_intro: Practice opinion writing with reasons through a guided mission and focused levels.

level_banks.label: Level 1: State an Opinion
level_banks.focus: Tell the sentence that shows what the writer thinks or prefers.

level_banks.label: Level 4: Build Opinion Paragraph
level_banks.focus: Write a short opinion paragraph with reasons and closure.

questions.prompt: Write an opinion paragraph about school gardens with an opinion, two reasons, linking words, and a conclusion.
questions.correct_answer: I think school gardens is important because students can learn about plants. Also, it helps our class. That is why school gardens matters.
hints: Read the prompt and identify the writing job.
Use the visual model to plan your answer.
Reread your answer before you finish.
questions.explanation: This answer matches the Grade 3 writing target and gives the reader enough information.
questions.feedback: Strong writing move — you used the checklist.

question_audio.text: Write an opinion paragraph about school gardens with an opinion, two reasons, linking words, and a conclusion.

story.text: Welcome to this Grade 3 Writing / Composition mission about Opinion Writing With Reasons. Listen for the writing goal, notice the visual model, and think about what a reader needs. Press Start Mission when you are ready to plan, answer, and check your work.
story.label: Read This Page

lesson.text: This lesson teaches Opinion Writing With Reasons. Look at the model and name each important part before you answer. Use the checklist to check meaning, order, capitalization, punctuation, and complete sentences. Press Next to continue.
lesson.label: Read This Page

watch.text: This watch page shows a worked example for Opinion Writing With Reasons. Step one is to read the prompt and decide the writing job. Step two is to use the model to plan the answer. Step three is to reread the final answer and explain why it fits. Press Next to continue.
watch.label: Read This Page

demo.text: This demo lets you try Opinion Writing With Reasons with support. Read the sentence or paragraph task first, then use the model to decide what belongs. Check your answer out loud like a careful Grade 3 writer. Press Next when you are ready for practice.
demo.label: Read This Page

practice.text: This practice page helps you try Opinion Writing With Reasons. Press Read Question to hear the exact prompt before you answer. Use the visual model, write or choose a complete response, and check the sentence for meaning. Answer carefully, then continue.
practice.label: Read This Page

challenge.text: This challenge page asks you to use Opinion Writing With Reasons with more independence. Press Read Question if you want the prompt read aloud. Think about the purpose, choose details or conventions that fit, and reread before you submit. Answer carefully, then continue.
challenge.label: Read This Page

checkpoint.text: This checkpoint shows what you can do with Opinion Writing With Reasons. Press Read Question to hear the task, then use the model and checklist. Check for complete meaning, capitals, punctuation, and any special writing parts. Answer carefully, then continue.
checkpoint.label: Read This Page

badge.text: This badge celebrates your Grade 3 work on Opinion Writing With Reasons. Think about the strategy you used, such as planning, adding details, using dialogue, combining sentences, or checking punctuation. Press Next to see your profile and keep growing.
badge.label: Read This Page

profile.text: This profile page shows your growth for Opinion Writing With Reasons. Look at attempts, correct answers, accuracy, hints, and the recommendation. Continue to Skill Practice for focused review, replay the mission, or go back to the hub.
profile.label: Read This Page
